parameters.query:
WITH inserted AS (
    INSERT INTO intake_events (
      execution_id,
      source,
      input_type,
      external_message_id,
      telegram_chat_id,
      telegram_user_id,
      raw_payload,
      status
    )
    VALUES (
      '{{ $json.execution_id }}',
      '{{ $json.source }}',
      '{{ $json.input_type }}',
      '{{ $json.message_id }}',
      {{ $json.chat_id }},
      {{ $json.user_id }},
      '{{ JSON.stringify($json.raw).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
      CASE
        WHEN {{ $json.is_command }} THEN 'ignored_command'
        WHEN {{ $json.is_callback }} THEN 'ignored_callback'
        ELSE 'received'
      END
    )
    RETURNING id, execution_id, status
),
logged AS (
    SELECT log_processing_event(
        inserted.execution_id,
        inserted.id,
        'intake_received',
        inserted.status,
        'Telegram input saved to intake_events',
        NULL,
        1
    )
    FROM inserted
)
SELECT inserted.id, inserted.execution_id, inserted.status
FROM inserted
CROSS JOIN logged;

WITH inserted AS (
    INSERT INTO candidate_inputs (
        intake_event_id,
        execution_id,
        source,
        input_type,
        original_text,
        normalized_text,
        processing_status
    )
    VALUES (
        '{{ $json.intake_event_id }}',
        '{{ $json.execution_id }}',
        '{{ $json.source }}',
        '{{ $json.input_type }}',
        '{{ ($json.text || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
        '{{ ($json.normalized_text || $json.text || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
        'prepared'
    )
    RETURNING id, intake_event_id, execution_id, processing_status
),
logged AS (
    SELECT log_processing_event(
        inserted.execution_id,
        inserted.intake_event_id,
        'candidate_input_prepared',
        inserted.processing_status,
        'Candidate input saved to candidate_inputs',
        NULL,
        1
    )
    FROM inserted
)
SELECT inserted.id, inserted.intake_event_id, inserted.execution_id, inserted.processing_status
FROM inserted
CROSS JOIN logged;

WITH inserted AS (
    INSERT INTO outbox (
        intake_event_id,
        candidate_id,
        channel,
        recipient,
        message_type,
        subject,
        body,
        reply_markup,
        status
    )
    VALUES (
       NULLIF('{{ $json.intake_event_id || "" }}', '')::uuid,
       NULLIF('{{ $json.candidate_id || "" }}', '')::uuid,
        '{{ $json.response_channel }}',
        COALESCE(
            NULLIF('{{ $json.response_recipient || "" }}', ''),
            (
                SELECT telegram_chat_id::text
                FROM intake_events
                WHERE id = '{{ $json.intake_event_id }}'
                LIMIT 1
            )
        ),
        '{{ $json.response_message_type }}',
        NULL,
        '{{ ($json.response_body || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
        NULLIF('{{ JSON.stringify($json.telegram_reply_markup || null).replace(/'/g, "''") }}', 'null')::jsonb,
        'pending'
    )
    RETURNING
        id,
        intake_event_id,
        candidate_id,
        channel,
        recipient,
        message_type,
        body,
        reply_markup,
        status
),
logged AS (
    SELECT log_processing_event(
        '{{ $json.execution_id }}',
        inserted.intake_event_id,
        'outbox_prepared',
        inserted.status,
        'Telegram response prepared in outbox, type=' || inserted.message_type,
        NULL,
        1
    )
    FROM inserted
)
SELECT
    id AS outbox_id,
    intake_event_id,
    candidate_id,
    channel,
    recipient,
    message_type,
    body,
    reply_markup,
    status
FROM inserted
CROSS JOIN logged;

nodes.name: Rename OGA to OGG for OpenAI STT
HTTP: OpenAI STT voice to text
Prepare OpenAI Body: Extract document text
HTTP: OpenAI OCR image to text

parameters.query:
WITH updated AS (
    UPDATE intake_events
    SET status = 'error'
    WHERE id = '{{ $json.intake_event_id }}'
    RETURNING id, execution_id, status
),
logged AS (
    SELECT log_processing_event(
        COALESCE(updated.execution_id, '{{ $json.execution_id || "unknown" }}'),
        updated.id,
        '{{ $json.error_type || "intake_error" }}',
        'error',
        '{{ ($json.error_stage || "intake").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
        '{{ ($json.error_message || "Intake error").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
        1
    )
    FROM updated
)
SELECT updated.id, updated.status
FROM updated
CROSS JOIN logged;
